findings.message: list_items() issues SELECT id, name, created_at FROM items but only the name column is consumed. All ORM columns are hydrated into Item objects and then immediately discarded, transferring ~2× more data than necessary per row.
findings.suggestion: Add a dedicated repository helper (e.g. list_item_names) that executes select(Item.name).order_by(Item.id).limit(bounded) and returns list[str] directly, avoiding full-row hydration. With MAX_PAGE_SIZE capped at 100 rows the absolute cost is small today, but the pattern scales poorly if the model grows wide columns (e.g. description, blob fields).
